title: Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting lamb stew made with tender lamb, potatoes, carrots, and onions in a rich and flavorful broth.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb cubes on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the diced potato, flour, beer, broth, thyme, salt, and pepper to the pot.
Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Return the lamb to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
